industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Energiedienst Holding AG
summary: Energiedienst Holding AG produces, distributes, and sells electricity in Switzerland. It generates electricity from hydro, gas, sun, and wind sources. The company also provides heating solutions. It serves approximately 270,000 private and commercial customers. The company is based in Laufenburg, Switzerland.
